name: Twilio Send SMS
description: Sends an SMS message via the Twilio API
author: awaitstep

to.label: To
to.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format.

from.label: From
from.description: Your Twilio phone number in E.164 format.

body.label: Message Body
body.description: The text content of the SMS message.

accountSid.label: Account SID
accountSid.description: Found in your Twilio console dashboard.

authToken.label: Auth Token
authToken.description: Found in your Twilio console dashboard.
